languages.text: Если лишить Себериана меча, но позволить свите и дальше тянуть его в разные стороны на совете, он обвинит Вольного Торговца в краже и казнит его. Стоит позаботиться и о мече, и о свите.

traits.locale_text: Если лишить Себериана меча, но позволить свите и дальше тянуть его в разные стороны на совете, он обвинит Вольного Торговца в краже и казнит его. Стоит позаботиться и о мече, и о свите.

languages.text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.
languages.original_text: Если лишить Себериана меча, но позволить свите и дальше тянуть его в разные стороны на совете, он обвинит Вольного Торговца в краже и казнит его. Стоит позаботиться и о мече, и о свите.

traits.locale_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute him. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute him. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

languages.text: Wenn Seberian seines Schwertes beraubt wäre, sein Gefolge aber weiterhin versuchte, ihn während des Rates in unterschiedliche Richtungen zu lenken, würde er {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} des Diebstahls bezichtigen und exekutieren. Es gilt also, sich mit Schwert und Gefolge zu befassen.
languages.original_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

traits.locale_text: Wenn Seberian seines Schwertes beraubt wäre, sein Gefolge aber weiterhin versuchte, ihn während des Rates in unterschiedliche Richtungen zu lenken, würde er {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} des Diebstahls bezichtigen und exekutieren. Es gilt also, sich mit Schwert und Gefolge zu befassen.

languages.text: Si Seberian est séparé de son épée alors que son entourage continue à le tirer dans des directions différentes pendant le conseil, il accusera {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} du vol et ordonnera son exécution. Il faut s'occuper à la fois de l'épée et de l'entourage.
languages.original_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

traits.locale_text: Si Seberian est séparé de son épée alors que son entourage continue à le tirer dans des directions différentes pendant le conseil, il accusera {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} du vol et ordonnera son exécution. Il faut s'occuper à la fois de l'épée et de l'entourage.

languages.text: 如果塞贝里安失去了那把剑，而他的随从在议会上继续各执一词，搞得他左右为难，他就会指控行商浪人偷了剑，并处决{mf|他|她}。因此，必须妥善处理那把剑和他的随从。
languages.original_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

traits.locale_text: 如果塞贝里安失去了那把剑，而他的随从在议会上继续各执一词，搞得他左右为难，他就会指控行商浪人偷了剑，并处决{mf|他|她}。因此，必须妥善处理那把剑和他的随从。

languages.text: Si se despoja a Seberian de su espada, pero se deja llevar igualmente por la influencia de su séquito durante el consejo, acusará de robo {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente y {mf|lo|la} ejecutará. Es necesario ocuparse tanto de la espada como del séquito.
languages.original_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

traits.locale_text: Si se despoja a Seberian de su espada, pero se deja llevar igualmente por la influencia de su séquito durante el consejo, acusará de robo {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente y {mf|lo|la} ejecutará. Es necesario ocuparse tanto de la espada como del séquito.

languages.text: セベリアンから剣を奪っておきながら、側近たちが評議会でセベリアンをさまざまな方向に引っ張り続けるようにすれば、セベリアンは自由商人が剣を盗んだと訴えて処刑するだろう。剣と側近の両方を大事にする価値はある。
languages.original_text: If you deprive Seberian of the sword, but let his retinue keep pulling him in different directions at the council, he'll accuse the Free Trader of stealing it and execute him. It's worth taking care of both the sword and the entourage.

languages.text: Eğer Seberian kılıcından mahrum bırakılırsa ve maiyeti konsey sırasında onu farklı yönlere çekmeye devam ederse Hür Tacir'i hırsızlıkla suçlayacak ve onu idam edecektir. Hem kılıçla hem de maiyetiyle ilgilenilmeli.
languages.original_text: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.

traits.locale_text: Eğer Seberian kılıcından mahrum bırakılırsa ve maiyeti konsey sırasında onu farklı yönlere çekmeye devam ederse Hür Tacir'i hırsızlıkla suçlayacak ve onu idam edecektir. Hem kılıçla hem de maiyetiyle ilgilenilmeli.
